title: SR&ED education and outreach - Canada.ca
content:
Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) tax incentives

## SR&ED education and outreach
The SR&ED outreach team helps eligible businesses understand how to access Canada’s largest federal research and development tax incentives.
Through outreach activities, the Canada Revenue Agency provides clear, accessible information on:
- Eligibility requirements and qualifying expenditures
- How to prepare an SR&ED claim
- Tools and services available to support the claim process
- How SR&ED supports business growth and innovation
Outreach advisors across Canada work closely with industry sector associations, innovation hubs, and economic development organizations to raise awareness of the SR&ED tax incentives. By delivering targeted outreach, they help eligible businesses of all sizes and in all sectors understand the program and prepare claims with clarity and confidence.
Register for a webinar to gain a deeper understanding of the SR&ED tax incentives.
Visit our multimedia gallery to access SR&ED resources.
Email us to book a one-on-one educational call that fits your needs.

### Contact the outreach team
If you would like more information on how the SR&ED outreach team can suuport your organization, or if you want to book a one-on-one call, email us.
Email : OESCPB-SVEDGPO@cra-arc.gc.ca
If you do email us, do not share personal or confidential information such as your business information or your access code. These emails are not encrypted.
Subscribe to our email list to receive the lastest news and updates on the SR&ED tax incentives.
